prompt: Create a cinematic dark-fantasy portrait of a regal blonde woman in ornate silver full-plate armor and a towering shirtless barbarian man standing side by side in front of a grand medieval stone cathedral. The composition is vertical and symmetrical, waist-to-full-body framing, dramatic realistic lighting, high-detail photorealism, gritty fantasy-film atmosphere. Include exactly 2 main foreground figures: the left figure wears intricately engraved polished silver armor, gauntlets, greaves, a pale embroidered tabard, and a long cream-white cape; the right figure is extremely muscular, wet or oiled skin, long dark curly hair, black leather-and-fur war skirt, wrapped bracers, rugged boots, and a sheathed sword at his side. Place exactly 6 background guards in reflective steel helmets and armor, holding tall polearms or spears, arranged behind the main pair like a royal battle escort. Add deep navy banners with ornate gold heraldic patterns hanging on the cathedral walls, stone paving underfoot, and a ceremonial military formation feel. Cover the visible faces with plain opaque brown rectangular censor blocks: one on the left main warrior, one on the right main warrior, and one on the left background guard. Use ultra-detailed photorealistic cinematic medieval fantasy, rich metallic reflections, high contrast, shallow depth of field, no modern objects, no text, no watermark.
